creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Thanks

(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #1)

> … I don't think that query is right. The very first result shows a 
> port that contains *meta*data. …

It's not a perfect search, in that it doesn't filter out words such as metadata and meta link. 

The intention of this simple search was to show roughly how many meta ports are described as such in the 'short description' (as it's worded in the FreshPorts search interface).
